hero.title: Our Facilities
hero.subtitle: A campus designed to inspire learning, play, and growth.

facilities.title: Smart Classrooms
facilities.description: Interactive whiteboards, projectors, and ergonomic furniture in every room.

facilities.title: Science Labs
facilities.description: Dedicated physics, chemistry, and biology labs with modern equipment.

facilities.title: Library
facilities.description: Over 15,000 titles across genres — a cozy reading haven for all ages.

facilities.title: Sports Complex
facilities.description: Football field, basketball courts, swimming pool, and indoor gym.

facilities.title: Art & Music Studios
facilities.description: Purpose-built studios for painting, pottery, vocals, and instruments.

facilities.title: Computer Lab
facilities.description: 50+ workstations with coding software, 3D printers, and robotics kits.

facilities.title: Cafeteria
facilities.description: Nutritionist-approved meals served fresh daily. Allergen-friendly options available.

facilities.title: Medical Room
facilities.description: On-campus nurse and first-aid facility. Annual health check-ups for all students.

facilities.title: Amphitheatre
facilities.description: 300-seat open-air venue for assemblies, performances, and celebrations.

facilities.title: Transport Fleet
facilities.description: GPS-tracked buses with trained attendants covering major routes.
